summary: Comprehensive testing of Loan Management feature completed. Fixed critical datetime bug in backend. All 23 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend testing verified complete loan lifecycle: create loan with treasury deduction, record repayments to different treasury accounts, status transitions (Active→Partially Paid→Fully Paid), view loan details with repayment history, summary report with status breakdown, and tab filtering.
passed_tests: Backend: Authentication required for /api/loans endpoints (401 without token)
Backend: Authentication required for /api/loans/reports/summary endpoint
Backend: GET /api/loans returns list of loans
Backend: GET /api/loans?status=active filters by status
Backend: POST /api/loans creates loan and deducts treasury balance
Backend: POST /api/loans rejects insufficient treasury balance (400)
Backend: POST /api/loans rejects invalid treasury account (404)
Backend: POST /api/loans rejects zero/negative amount (400)
Backend: POST /api/loans supports installment repayment mode
Backend: GET /api/loans/{loan_id} returns loan with repayment history
Backend: GET /api/loans/{loan_id} returns 404 for invalid ID
Backend: POST /api/loans/{loan_id}/repayment records partial repayment, status→partially_paid
Backend: POST /api/loans/{loan_id}/repayment records full repayment, status→fully_paid
Backend: POST /api/loans/{loan_id}/repayment credits to different treasury account
Backend: POST /api/loans/{loan_id}/repayment rejects zero amount (400)
Backend: POST /api/loans/{loan_id}/repayment rejects invalid treasury (404)
Backend: POST /api/loans/{loan_id}/repayment rejects on fully_paid loan (400)
Backend: DELETE /api/loans/{loan_id} deletes loan and restores treasury balance
Backend: DELETE /api/loans/{loan_id} rejects loan with repayments (400)
Backend: DELETE /api/loans/{loan_id} returns 404 for invalid ID
Backend: GET /api/loans/reports/summary returns correct aggregations
Backend: Interest calculation is correct for 1-year loan
Frontend: Loans page loads with navigation link in sidebar
Frontend: Summary cards show Total Disbursed, Outstanding, Total Repaid, Interest Earned
Frontend: Status badges show Active, Partially Paid, Fully Paid, Overdue counts
Frontend: Tabs filter loans by status (All, Active, Partially Paid, Fully Paid)
Frontend: New Loan button opens create loan dialog
Frontend: Create Loan dialog has all required fields with data-testid attributes
Frontend: Treasury dropdown shows account names with balances
Frontend: Loan creation shows success toast and updates list
Frontend: Record Repayment dialog shows loan details and outstanding balance
Frontend: Repayment to different treasury account works
Frontend: Loan status updates to Partially Paid after partial repayment
Frontend: View Details dialog shows loan info and repayment history table
Frontend: Delete button only visible for loans with no repayments (admin only)

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes in get_loans_summary and get_loans endpoints
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added proper timezone handling for due_date comparison - now handles both ISO datetime strings and date-only strings with timezone awareness

critical_code_review_comments: The datetime bug fix was critical - the original code failed when comparing dates without timezone info
All form fields have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test loans created during testing with TEST_ prefix and UI_Test_Company. Cleanup fixture removes TEST_ prefixed loans.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loan Management feature fully tested and working. Key features: 1) POST /api/loans creates loan and deducts from source treasury. 2) POST /api/loans/{id}/repayment records repayment and credits to selected treasury - status auto-updates. 3) DELETE /api/loans/{id} only works if no repayments exist, restores treasury balance. 4) GET /api/loans/reports/summary returns aggregated stats. 5) Exchange rates are MOCKED in backend EXCHANGE_RATES_TO_USD dict. 6) All UI dialogs working with proper data-testid attributes.

loan_creation.form_fields: Borrower, Amount, Currency, Interest Rate, Loan Date, Due Date, Repayment Mode, Treasury Account, Notes
loan_creation.treasury_deduction: Working - balance decreases on loan creation
loan_creation.interest_calculation: Working - calculates simple interest based on rate and duration

loan_repayment.different_treasury: Working - can credit repayment to any treasury account
loan_repayment.multi_currency: Working - converts to loan currency using exchange rates

loan_delete.no_repayments: Working - deletes loan and restores treasury balance
loan_delete.admin_only: Working - delete button only visible to admin

loan_reports.summary_endpoint: Working - returns totals, status breakdown, by_borrower breakdown

loan_details.view_dialog: Working - shows loan info and repayment history
loan_details.repayment_history: Working - lists all repayments with date, amount, treasury, reference

mocked_apis.exchange_rates: Currency exchange rates are hardcoded in backend/server.py EXCHANGE_RATES_TO_USD
